title: Yijing Hexagram 45: Cui (Gathering Together)
description: Hexagram 45 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.
introduction: Hexagram 45 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.

translation.text: Gathering Together. Success. The king approaches his temple. It furthers one to see the great man.
